summary: Comprehensive synthesis addressing two methodological critiques raised during the thesis review: (1) the circular dependency created by using NDVI to generate training labels while also including NDVI in the 16-feature training vector, and (2) the absence of a formal Area of Applicability computation despite citing Meyer & Pebesma (2021). Provides three route options for the NDVI issue (Route A: remove NDVI/SAVI from features — recommended; Route B: re-derive labels; Route C: defend as-is — weakest), with specific code changes for the recommended route. Also details AOA implementation using either the CAST Python package or manual dissimilarity index computation. Includes a prioritised action plan estimating ~6 hours total work.
